name: @bilibili-video-analysis/desktop
description: 本地运行的 Bilibili 视频分析桌面工具
author: 省流看

scripts.build: pnpm build:main && pnpm build:api && pnpm prepare:resources
scripts.build:main: tsup src/main.ts src/preload.ts --format cjs --platform node --external electron --out-dir dist --clean
scripts.build:api: tsup ../api/dist/utility.js --format cjs --platform node --out-dir dist/api --external class-transformer --external class-validator --external @nestjs/microservices --external @nestjs/websockets
scripts.dev: pnpm build && concurrently -k "pnpm --dir ../web dev" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env BVA_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
